headline: McDonald's expands in Ukraine; Penetron technology helps protect concrete
summary: McDonald's opened its newest restaurants in Kyiv and Lviv. Kyiv, in north-central Ukraine along the Dnieper River, is the capital and largest city, with a population of 2.9 million and a metropolitan area of more than 5 million. It is an important industrial, scientific and educational center for Eastern Europe.
